subject: [PATCH v1 4/4] fuse: clean up interrupt reading

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good, but there are some minor issues with the code formatting and style. The changes should be applied carefully to avoid introducing new bugs.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series cleans up the interrupt reading logic in the fuse kernel module, removing unnecessary code and making header initializations more readable.
